lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨੀ ਚਲਣੁ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਖਰਚੁ ਲੀਆ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: onee chalan sadaa nihaaliaa har kharach leea pat paae |
lines.english: They keep death constantly before their eyes; they gather the Provisions of the Lord's Name, and receive honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਮੰਨੀਅਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਲਏ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh daragah maneeeh har aap le gal laae |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are honored in the Court of the Lord. The Lord Himself takes them in His Loving Embrace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਪੰਥੁ ਪਰਗਟਾ ਦਰਿ ਠਾਕ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukhaa no panth paragattaa dar tthaak na koee paae |
lines.english: For the Gurmukhs, the Way is obvious. At the Lord's Door, they face no obstructions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹਨਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har naam salaahan naam man naam rehan liv laae |
lines.english: They praise the Lord's Name, they keep the Naam in their minds, and they remain attached to the Love of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦ ਧੁਨੀ ਦਰਿ ਵਜਦੇ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anahad dhunee dar vajade dar sachai sobhaa paae |3|
lines.english: The Unstruck Celestial Music vibrates for them at the Lord's Door, and they are honored at the True Door. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੈ ਜਾਚਿਕ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee sangat dehi prabh mai jaachik kee aradaas |
lines.english: Grant me their company, God-I am a beggar; this is my prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਸਭ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee guramukh naam salaahiaa tinaa sabh ko kahai saabaas |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who praise the Naam are applauded by everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਾਗ ਵਡੇ ਤਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਜਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿ ॥੪॥੩੩॥੩੧॥੬॥੭੦॥
lines.translit: naanak bhaag vadde tinaa guramukhaa jin antar naam paragaas |4|33|31|6|70|
lines.english: O Nanak, great is the good fortune of those Gurmukhs, who are filled with the Light of the Naam within. ||4||33||31||6||70||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਭੋਗਹਿ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਮਾਣਹਿ ਰੰਗ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ras bhogeh khuseea kareh maaneh rang apaar |
lines.english: You enjoy tasty delicacies, you have lots of fun, and you indulge in endless pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਤੂ ਰਤਾ ਦੇਖਿ ਕੈ ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਸੀਗਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa too rataa dekh kai putr kalatr seegaar |
lines.english: Why are you so thrilled by the sight of your son and your beautifully decorated wife?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਸੀ ਵਰਤਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਅਫਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bahut kareh furamaaeisee varateh hoe afaar |
lines.english: You give all sorts of commands, and you act so superior.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧ ਗਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karataa chit na aavee manamukh andh gavaar |1|
lines.english: The Creator does not come into the mind of the blind, idiotic, self-willed manmukh. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee paaeeai karam paraapat hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He is found. By His Mercy, He is obtained. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man sukhadaataa har soe |
lines.english: O my mind, the Lord is the Giver of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਪੜਿ ਭੋਗਿ ਲਪਟਾਇਆ ਸੁਇਨਾ ਰੁਪਾ ਖਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaparr bhog lapattaaeaa sueinaa rupaa khaak |
lines.english: People are entangled in the enjoyment of fine clothes, but gold and silver are only dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈਵਰ ਗੈਵਰ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗੇ ਕੀਏ ਰਥ ਅਥਾਕ ॥
lines.translit: haivar gaivar bahu range kee rath athaak |
lines.english: They acquire beautiful horses and elephants, and ornate carriages of many kinds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਵਹੀ ਬਿਸਰਿਆ ਸਭ ਸਾਕ ॥
lines.translit: kis hee chit na paavahee bisariaa sabh saak |
lines.english: They think of nothing else, and they forget all their relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਨਾਪਾਕ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sirajanahaar bhulaaeaa vin naavai naapaak |2|
lines.english: They ignore their Creator; without the Name, they are impure. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈਦਾ ਬਦ ਦੁਆਇ ਤੂੰ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਇਕਤ ॥
lines.translit: laidaa bad duaae toon maaeaa kareh ikat |
lines.english: Gathering the wealth of Maya, you earn an evil reputation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂੰ ਪਤੀਆਇਦਾ ਸੋ ਸਣੁ ਤੁਝੈ ਅਨਿਤ ॥
lines.translit: jis no toon pateeaeidaa so san tujhai anit |
lines.english: Those whom you work to please shall pass away along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀਆ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: ahankaar kareh ahankaareea viaapiaa man kee mat |
lines.english: The egotistical are engrossed in egotism, ensnared by the intellect of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਪਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tin prabh aap bhulaaeaa naa tis jaat na pat |3|
lines.english: One who is deceived by God Himself, has no position and no honor. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਦਰਿ ਫੇਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo har jan bhaavai so kare dar fer na paavai koe |
lines.english: As the servant of the Lord wills, so does the Lord act. At the Lord's Door, none of his requests are denied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਇਕੋ ਸਜਣੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh milaaeaa iko sajan soe |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, has led me to meet the One, my only Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕਾ ਰਾਖਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਮਾਣਸ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jan kaa raakhaa ek hai kiaa maanas haumai roe |
lines.english: The One is the Saving Grace of His humble servant. Why should the proud cry out in ego?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਤਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਭ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧॥੭੧॥
lines.translit: naanak rataa rang har sabh jag meh chaanan hoe |4|1|71|
lines.english: Nanak is attuned to the Love of the Lord, whose Light pervades the entire Universe. ||4||1||71||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਬਿਲਾਸੁ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਘਣਾ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਭੂਲਿ ਖੁਸੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: man bilaas bahu rang ghanaa drisatt bhool khuseea |
lines.english: With the mind caught up in playful pleasures, involved in all sorts of amusements and sights that stagger the eyes, people are led astray.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਤ੍ਰਧਾਰ ਬਾਦਿਸਾਹੀਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਹਸੇ ਪਰੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: chhatradhaar baadisaaheea vich sahase pareea |1|
lines.english: The emperors sitting on their thrones are consumed by anxiety. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re sukh saadhasang paaeaa |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, peace is found in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਆ ਲੇਖੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਬਿਧਾਤੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਹਸਾ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: likhiaa lekh tin purakh bidhaatai dukh sahasaa mitt geaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If the Supreme Lord, the Architect of Destiny, writes such an order, then anguish and anxiety are erased. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਾ ਤੇਤੇ ਭਵਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jete thaan thanantaraa tete bhav aaeaa |
lines.english: There are so many places-I have wandered through them all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਪਾਤੀ ਵਡ ਭੂਮੀਆ ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਪਰਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhan paatee vadd bhoomeea meree meree kar pariaa |2|
lines.english: The masters of wealth and the great land-lords have fallen, crying out, "This is mine! This is mine!" ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਵਸਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਲਇਓਨੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਖਾਕੁ ਰਲਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh ko vasagat kar leon bin naavai khaak raliaa |3|
lines.english: They subdue all under their command, but without the Name, they are reduced to dust. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਚਲਾਏ ਨਿਸੰਗ ਹੋਇ ਵਰਤੈ ਅਫਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hukam chalaae nisang hoe varatai afariaa |
lines.english: They issue their commands fearlessly, and act in pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਰੰਬਾਰੀ ਵਡ ਸਾਹਬੀ ਸਭੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਪਨੁ ਥੀਆ ॥੪॥੨॥੭੨॥
lines.translit: giranbaaree vadd saahabee sabh naanak supan theea |4|2|72|
lines.english: who live in wondrous affluence and rule over mountains, oceans and vast dominions-O Nanak, in the end, all this vanishes like a dream! ||4||2||72||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਤੇਤੀਸ ਸੇਵਕਾ ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਦਰਿ ਖਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kott tetees sevakaa sidh saadhik dar khariaa |
lines.english: Even those who are served by the 33 million angelic beings, at whose door the Siddhas and the Saadhus stand,
